title: grewia crenifolia
intro: Grewia crenifolia is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae, commonly known as the rough-leaved hawthorn or wild rose. The plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of Grewia crenifolia include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and provide relief from digestive issues, among others. Herbal preparations of Grewia crenifolia can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a decoction, which can be consumed as a tea or used as a topical application.
